rationale: In the citing paper, Hershfield et al. (2011) is cited once in a grouped parenthetical as an example of prior research on retirement savings during the accumulation stage. The citation functions as broad background positioning (accumulation vs. decumulation focus) rather than as a source for hypotheses, mechanisms, measures, or methods used in the annuity study. The paper does not engage the future-self intervention findings in its conceptual model or empirical design.
